description: NorthData API for German company, owner, and financial data — with a built-in credit guard.
name: io.github.p-meier/northdata-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Your NorthData API key. Obtain one at https://www.northdata.com
environmentVariables.name: NORTHDATA_API_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Power-search 'limit' above this requires approve_high_cost=true. Default: 25.
environmentVariables.name: NORTHDATA_APPROVAL_THRESHOLD

environmentVariables.description: Hard ceiling for power-search 'limit'. Default: 100. Flag-immune.
environmentVariables.name: NORTHDATA_ABSOLUTE_MAX

environmentVariables.description: Path to the local credit log file. Default: ~/.northdata/credits.jsonl
environmentVariables.name: NORTHDATA_CREDIT_LOG
